records.question: Which accounts dated on or before 1993-01-11 are linked to districts where a11 is exactly 10673 and the clients are female?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT account.account_id FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN client ON district.district_id = client.district_id
WHERE account.date <= '1993-01-11' AND client.gender = 'F' AND district.a11 = 10673
records.pred_sql:
SELECT account.account_id
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
WHERE account.date <= '1993-01-11'
  AND district.A11 = 10673
  AND client.gender = 'F'

records.question: Which accounts, that have related districts with a3 exactly 'north Bohemia', a8 at most 2, and a4 exactly '85852', and that also have related loans, have frequency exactly 'POPLATEK MESICNE'?

SELECT account.account_id FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE account.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE' AND district.a3 = 'north Bohemia' AND district.a8 <= 2 AND district.a4 = '85852'

JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE district.A3 = 'north Bohemia'
  AND district.A8 <= 2
  AND district.A4 = '85852'
  AND account.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE'

records.question: Which accounts have a related district with a12 equal to 4.8 and also have related loan and trans records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT account.account_id FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id

AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trans WHERE trans.account_id = account.account_id)

records.question: Which accounts have a related district with a2 exactly equal to 'Brno - venkov', have related disp records, have related loan records with a date at least '1993-11-10', and have related trans records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT account.account_id FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.date >= '1993-11-10' AND district.a2 = 'Brno - venkov'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT account.account_id
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN disp ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN loan ON loan.account_id = account.account_id AND loan.date >= '1993-11-10'
JOIN trans ON trans.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE district.A2 = 'Brno - venkov'
GROUP BY account.account_id
